rulings.Case Title: ROBERT CRAIG JOYNER VS. YAT-PANG AU et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn For Sanctions Due To Defts' Violation Of Crc 3.1380 And Lr 5.0
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 23, 2013, line 1. PLAINTIFF ROBERT JOYNER's Motion For Sanctions Due To Defendants' Violation Of Crc 3.1380 And Lr 5.0. Grant sanctions as requested in the amount of $1,650.00. Court finds no justifiable excuse for not appearing at mandatory settlement conference. Prevailing party to prepare order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Further Responses To Req.'S For Admission, Set One, Special Interrogatories, Set One, And Req. For Production Of Documents
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 23, 2013, line 2. PLAINTIFFs SAL CASTILLO, NANCY WILLIAMSON, INDIVIDUALLY AND ON BEHALF OF ALL SIMILARLY SITUATED INDIVIDUALS' Amended Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Admission, Set One, Special Interrogatories, Set One, And Request For Production Of Documents. Continued to 1/29/13. Parties are to provide courtesy copies of moving papers (plaintiffs) and opposition (defendants) to Department 501 no later than 1/23/13. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MOHSIN AHMMED VS. BANK OF AMERICA N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 23, 2013, line 3. DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA N.A.'s DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Continued to March 12, 2013 to be heard together with Chicago Title's Demurrer to First Amended Complaint. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MOHSIN AHMMED VS. BANK OF AMERICA N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 23, 2013, line 3. DEFENDANT FIA CARD SERVICES N.A.'s DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Continued to March 12, 2013 to be heard together with Chicago Title's Demurrer to First Amended Complaint. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TERRY MCCOY et al VS. BALWANTSINH THAKOR et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Class Certification
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 23, 2013, line 4. PLAINTIFFS ERIC BOICE, MARIA ACOSTA, VINETTA BOICE, JONATHAN BRADDY and ANGELA BRONTLEY's Motion For Class Certification. Defendants' objections are sustained. Motion to certify sub class is denied. First cause of action failed to present evidence proposed class representatives are suitable or their claims are atypical. Second cause of action failed to present evidence of numerosity. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHICO MALL INVESTORS LLC VS. CHINESE GOURMET GROUP INC.,
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 23, 2013, line 5. CROSS DEFENDANT CHICO MALL INVESTORS LLC's DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT. Continued to 2/1/13. Opposing party to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of opposition no later than 1/23/13 by 4 p.m. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 23, 2013, line 6. Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction. Continued to 1/29/13. rulings.Case Title: THERESA LYNNE MURPHY VS. WILLIAM S. COLEMAN et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 23, 2013, line 7. PLAINTIFF THERESA MURPHY's Motion For Publication. Deny, improperly noticed in Department 501 San Francisco Local Rule 3.1(c)(2). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THERESA LYNNE MURPHY VS. WILLIAM S. COLEMAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Service On Secretary Of State
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 23, 2013, line 7. PLAINTIFF THERESA MURPHY's Motion For Service On Secretary Of State. Deny, no admissable evidence to show Pro Funding is dissolved and or that William Coleman is and "officer, director or person" in charge of Pro Funding. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THERESA LYNNE MURPHY VS. WILLIAM S. COLEMAN et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 23, 2013, line 7. PLAINTIFF THERESA MURPHY's Motion For Pendency Of Action. Deny, failed to name and serve all entities claiming interest in the premises. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CAC REAL ESTATE MANAGEMENT CO., INC., A VS. FLEISCHMAN FIELD RESEARCH, INC., A CALIFORNIA
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 23, 2013, line 10. PLAINTIFF CAC REAL ESTATE MANAGEMENT CO., INC.'s, A MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Deny, failed to shift burden. No evidence re possession unit 16. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SFDD INVESTMENTS, LLC VS. EDWARD FOY
rulings.Rulings: DHousing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 23, 2013, line 8. EFENDANT EDWARD FOY's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. Deny, Motion to Strike Complaint, 1) improperly relies on facts beyond face of pleading, and 2) compliance with CCP 446. Five days to answer. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ALL HALLOWS PRESERVATION, L.P. VS. DEBORAH JENKINS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 23, 2013, line 9. DEFENDANT DEBORAH JENKINS' MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS. Deny, failed to sustain burden, no competent evidence. = (501/REQ)
